CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, message VARCHAR(255));
SELECT message || (id * 2) FROM test_table WHERE id < 3;
SELECT message || (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE another_table (code INT, description VARCHAR(255));
SELECT t1.message || a.description FROM test_table t1 JOIN another_table a ON t1.id = a.code / 10;
SELECT 'Result: ' || (SELECT AVG(code) FROM another_table) FROM test_table;
WITH temp AS (SELECT id, message || 100 AS modified_message FROM test_table) SELECT modified_message FROM temp WHERE id = 1;
